user.title: Choose your utility
user.description: Pick the utility company that provides your energy data. Only utilities currently supported by the Open Green Button proxy server are shown.

connect.title: Authorize with {utility_name}
connect.description:
**Step 1.** Open the authorization link below in a new tab and complete the Green Button consent flow with {utility_name}.

[Authorize {utility_name} →]({authorize_url})

**Step 2.** After consent, the page shows a code starting with `gb_live_`. Paste it below.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authorize {utility_name}
reauth_confirm.description:
Your authorization with {utility_name} has expired or was revoked. Re-authorize by opening this link in a new tab:

[Re-authorize {utility_name} →]({authorize_url})

After consent, paste the new claim code below.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Open Green Button server. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.claim_code_empty: Paste the claim code shown on the authorization page after consent.
error.invalid_or_expired_code: This claim code is unknown, expired, or already used. Open the authorize link again to get a fresh code.

abort.already_configured: This utility account is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Open Green Button server.
abort.no_utilities: The Open Green Button server has no utilities configured.
abort.unknown_utility: The selected utility is no longer available.
